title: lithocarpus mianningensis
intro: Lithocarpus mianningensis, also known as the Mianning Lithocarpus, is a species of plant in the beech family Fagaceae that is native to Yunnan, China. This plant is valued for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antioxidant, and antimicrobial properties. The health benefits of Lithocarpus mianningensis include its potential to lower blood pressure, reduce fever, and alleviate respiratory issues such as bronchitis and asthma. The plant can be prepared into herbal remedies, including teas and extracts, which are often used to promote overall well-being and support the immune system.
